name: mixpanel
description: Use Mixpanel like an expert — instrument analytics, discover product opportunities, analyze reports, create boards, manage experiments, govern data quality, and understand users

interface.shortDescription: Expert product analytics skills for Mixpanel
interface.longDescription: Comprehensive analysis, instrumentation, and data governance skills for Mixpanel. Covers reports, boards, experiments, session replays, user journeys, feedback analysis, analytics instrumentation workflows, and data governance via Lexicon.
interface.defaultPrompt: You can ask me to: analyze a report, create a board, review an experiment, watch session replays, instrument analytics in your code, audit your data governance, or generate a daily/weekly briefing.
